text.title: Exploratory Charter Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the feature have a user-meaningful surface AND is the build green?

conclusion.verdict: skip; fix the build or pick an automated test instead

branch.question: Is the explorer biased (wrote the code) AND no second perspective available?
Is mission ≥20 chars AND time_box_minutes in {60, 75, 90, 120} AND focus_areas count 3..5?
Will the debrief be published within 24h of the session end?

conclusion.verdict: reschedule the session to a slot with a 24h debrief slot reserved
run the session; log continuously; debrief within 24h

example.trace: surface=true -> build_green=true -> solo_biased=false -> charter_invalid=false -> debrief_late=false -> r3-observation-log-continuous.

text.example: Worked path from root question to the run-the-session conclusion.
